subtitle: Quality Management System
description: A comprehensive enterprise-grade compliance suite designed for the pharmaceutical and research sectors. Scale your quality operations with integrated digital workflows.

agile_strategy.title: Agile Development Strategy
agile_strategy.description: Our development follows a transparent milestone system. Each percentage represents a critical phase of the software lifecycle.

items.name: SOP Module
items.text: Full lifecycle management for Standard Operating Procedures with secure digital approvals.

items.name: Document Control
items.text: Centralized, regulatory-compliant repository for all quality-critical documentation.

items.name: Deviation Management
items.text: Automated incident tracking and investigation workflows for operational excellence.

items.name: Risk Assessment
items.text: Quantitative and qualitative risk identification based on ICH Q9 regulatory standards.

items.name: Change Control
items.text: Formalized impact assessment and tracking for changes across systems and processes.

items.name: CAPA Management
items.text: Closed-loop corrective and preventive actions to drive continuous quality improvement.

items.name: Training Module
items.text: Competency-based training automation and personnel qualification tracking.
